title: Thingamajigs 2 Long Roads
description: Adds asphalt, road markings, and data-driven signs to your worlds!
body:
Welcome to Thingamajigs 2 Long Roads, an addon for Thingamajigs 2 (NeoForge) that adds many road-related commodities to your worlds!

![Pixelated Road with white road markings on it, with floating scrape tool nearby](https://github.com/CreativeMasterBonin/thingmajigs/blob/main/previewnewroad.png?raw=true)

This mod includes the following features:
- Asphalt of four ages each with slabs
- Sidewalk with variants which have slabs
- Paintbrushes of three colors to paint 20+ road markings on asphalt
- Fully Customizable Road Signs, completely data driven!

Learn how to make your own Road Signs here: https://bonincreativemedia.gitbook.io/thingamajigs-docs/thingamajigs-2-long-roads/dynamic-sign
